time_range_query.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM LogEntry WHERE TimestampUTC >= '2025-06-09T00:00:00Z' AND TimestampUTC <= '2025-06-09T23:59:59Z' AND SeverityLevelId IN (SELECT SeverityLevelId FROM SeverityLevel WHERE LevelName = 'ERROR')

service_query.description: Find payment service logs between specified times
service_query.sqlQuery: SELECT * FROM LogEntry WHERE ServiceId IN (SELECT ServiceId FROM Service WHERE ServiceName = 'payment-service') AND TimestampUTC >= '2025-06-10T12:00:00Z' AND TimestampUTC <= '2025-06-10T14:00:00Z'

semantic_query.description: Find logs semantically similar to 'database connection timeout'
semantic_query.vectorOperation: Find logEntries similar to embedding(database connection timeout) with cosine similarity > 0.7

hybrid_query.description: Find auth service logs similar to 'authentication token expired'
hybrid_query.sqlQuery: SELECT LogEntryId FROM LogEntry WHERE ServiceId IN (SELECT ServiceId FROM Service WHERE ServiceName = 'auth-service')
hybrid_query.vectorOperation: On results from SQL, find entries similar to embedding(authentication token expired) with cosine similarity > 0.75

anomaly_query.analysisOperation: Perform anomaly detection on logs from 2025-06-10
